content.text:
Now I can clearly see atom C:10 in the image. Looking at the structure, atom C:10 (carbon) is part of a carbonyl group and is connected to:

1. O:11 (oxygen) - the double bond oxygen in the carbonyl group
2. C:6 (carbon) - connected via a single bond
3. C:16 (carbon) - connected via a single bond

From the image, I can confirm that C:10 has three covalent connections: one double bond to O:11 and two single bonds to C:6 and C:16.

The geomconf_index for this molecule can be determined from the filename "geomconf_327.xyz", which indicates geomconf_index = 327.

Let me provide the final answer:

Neighbour atoms of atom index 10 (C):
- Atom index 6, element C
- Atom index 11, element O  
- Atom index 16, element C

Geomconf_index: 327

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 10, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
